GAP_ERR_INVALID_PARAM.name: gapc_connect_req
GAP_ERR_INVALID_PARAM.condition: Invalid connection parameters (interval, latency, timeout out of range)

GAP_ERR_INVALID_PARAM.name: gapc_param_update_req
GAP_ERR_INVALID_PARAM.condition: Invalid connection interval, latency, or supervision timeout

GAP_ERR_INVALID_PARAM.name: gapm_start_advertising_req
GAP_ERR_INVALID_PARAM.condition: Invalid advertising parameters (type, interval, channel map)

GAP_ERR_TIMEOUT.name: gapc_connect_req
GAP_ERR_TIMEOUT.condition: Connection attempt timed out (peer not responding or out of range)

GAP_ERR_TIMEOUT.name: gapc_param_update_req
GAP_ERR_TIMEOUT.condition: Connection parameter update negotiation timed out

GAP_ERR_TIMEOUT.name: gapc_bond_req
GAP_ERR_TIMEOUT.condition: Pairing process timed out waiting for user input

GAP_ERR_DISCONNECTED.name: gattc_read_req
GAP_ERR_DISCONNECTED.condition: Read operation interrupted by connection loss

GAP_ERR_DISCONNECTED.name: gattc_write_req
GAP_ERR_DISCONNECTED.condition: Write operation interrupted by connection loss

GAP_ERR_NOT_FOUND.name: gapm_scan_req
GAP_ERR_NOT_FOUND.condition: Scan completed but no devices found matching filter criteria

GAP_ERR_NOT_FOUND.name: gattc_disc_svc_all_req
GAP_ERR_NOT_FOUND.condition: Service discovery completed but no matching service found

GAP_ERR_REJECTED.name: gapc_connect_req
GAP_ERR_REJECTED.condition: Connection rejected by peer device (not accepting connections)

GAP_ERR_REJECTED.name: gapc_param_update_req
GAP_ERR_REJECTED.condition: Connection parameter update rejected by peer

GAP_ERR_ADV_DATA_INVALID.name: gapm_start_advertising_req
GAP_ERR_ADV_DATA_INVALID.condition: Advertising data exceeds 31 bytes or contains duplicate data

GAP_ERR_ADV_DATA_INVALID.name: gapm_set_adv_data_req
GAP_ERR_ADV_DATA_INVALID.condition: Invalid advertising data format or length

ATT_ERR_INVALID_HANDLE.name: gattc_read_req
ATT_ERR_INVALID_HANDLE.condition: Reading with handle that doesn't exist or not discovered yet

ATT_ERR_INVALID_HANDLE.name: gattc_write_req
ATT_ERR_INVALID_HANDLE.condition: Writing to handle that doesn't exist or not discovered yet

ATT_ERR_READ_NOT_PERMITTED.name: gattc_read_req
ATT_ERR_READ_NOT_PERMITTED.condition: Reading characteristic that doesn't have read permission

ATT_ERR_READ_NOT_PERMITTED.name: gattc_read_long_req
ATT_ERR_READ_NOT_PERMITTED.condition: Long read on characteristic without read permission

ATT_ERR_WRITE_NOT_PERMITTED.name: gattc_write_req
ATT_ERR_WRITE_NOT_PERMITTED.condition: Writing to characteristic without write permission

ATT_ERR_WRITE_NOT_PERMITTED.name: gattc_write_long_req
ATT_ERR_WRITE_NOT_PERMITTED.condition: Long write to characteristic without write permission

ATT_ERR_WRITE_NOT_PERMITTED.name: gattc_signed_write_req
ATT_ERR_WRITE_NOT_PERMITTED.condition: Signed write to characteristic without write permission

ATT_ERR_ATTRIBUTE_NOT_FOUND.name: gattc_read_req
ATT_ERR_ATTRIBUTE_NOT_FOUND.condition: Reading handle returned from discovery but attribute removed

ATT_ERR_ATTRIBUTE_NOT_FOUND.name: gattc_write_req
ATT_ERR_ATTRIBUTE_NOT_FOUND.condition: Writing to handle that was removed

ATT_ERR_ATTRIBUTE_NOT_FOUND.name: gattc_disc_svc_all_req
ATT_ERR_ATTRIBUTE_NOT_FOUND.condition: Service with specified UUID not found on peer device

ATT_ERR_ATTRIBUTE_NOT_FOUND.name: gattc_disc_char_all_req
ATT_ERR_ATTRIBUTE_NOT_FOUND.condition: Characteristic with specified UUID not found

ATT_ERR_INSUFF_ENC_KEY_SIZE.name: gattc_read_req
ATT_ERR_INSUFF_ENC_KEY_SIZE.condition: Reading encrypted characteristic with insufficient key size

ATT_ERR_INSUFF_ENC_KEY_SIZE.name: gattc_write_req
ATT_ERR_INSUFF_ENC_KEY_SIZE.condition: Writing encrypted characteristic with insufficient key size

ATT_ERR_INVALID_ATTRIBUTE_VAL_LEN.name: gattc_write_req
ATT_ERR_INVALID_ATTRIBUTE_VAL_LEN.condition: Writing value exceeding characteristic max length

ATT_ERR_INSUFF_ENC.name: gattc_read_req
ATT_ERR_INSUFF_ENC.condition: Reading encrypted characteristic before encryption established

ATT_ERR_INSUFF_ENC.name: gattc_write_req
ATT_ERR_INSUFF_ENC.condition: Writing encrypted characteristic before encryption established

L2C_ERR_INSUFF_CREDIT.name: l2cc_send_req
L2C_ERR_INSUFF_CREDIT.condition: Sending data without available credits (flow control)

L2C_ERR_INSUFF_CREDIT.name: gattc_write_req
L2C_ERR_INSUFF_CREDIT.condition: Write operation blocked due to no L2CAP credits

L2C_ERR_INVALID_MTU_EXCEED.name: l2cc_send_req
L2C_ERR_INVALID_MTU_EXCEED.condition: Sending PDU exceeding negotiated MTU size

L2C_ERR_INVALID_MTU_EXCEED.name: gattc_write_req
L2C_ERR_INVALID_MTU_EXCEED.condition: Write data exceeds MTU (should use long write)

GATT_ERR_INVALID_ATT_LEN.name: gattc_read_cfm
GATT_ERR_INVALID_ATT_LEN.condition: Read response length doesn't match expected

SMP_ERR_LOC_ENC_KEY_SIZE.name: gapc_bond_req
SMP_ERR_LOC_ENC_KEY_SIZE.condition: Negotiated encryption key size below minimum requirement

SMP_ERR_ENC_KEY_MISSING.name: gapc_encrypt_req
SMP_ERR_ENC_KEY_MISSING.condition: No LTK stored for peer device (need to re-pair)

SMP_ERR_ADDR_RESOLV_FAIL.name: gapm_addr_renew_req
SMP_ERR_ADDR_RESOLV_FAIL.condition: RPA address resolution failed (peer IRK not in resolving list)

PRF_ERR_INEXISTENT_HDL.condition: Reading with handle that doesn't exist

PRF_ERR_INEXISTENT_HDL.name: prf_write_req
PRF_ERR_INEXISTENT_HDL.condition: Writing to handle that doesn't exist

PRF_ERR_NTF_DISABLED.condition: Sending notification when client hasn't enabled CCCD

PRF_ERR_IND_DISABLED.name: prf_send_ind_req
PRF_ERR_IND_DISABLED.condition: Sending indication when client hasn't enabled CCCD

PRF_CCCD_IMPR_CONFIGURED.name: prf_send_ntf_req
PRF_CCCD_IMPR_CONFIGURED.condition: CCCD value is invalid or corrupted

PRF_PROC_IN_PROGRESS.name: prf_read_req
PRF_PROC_IN_PROGRESS.condition: Starting new operation while previous one not completed

LL_ERR_CON_TIMEOUT.name: gapc_connect_req
LL_ERR_CON_TIMEOUT.condition: Connection supervision timeout (no response from peer)

LL_ERR_CON_LIMIT_EXCEED.name: gapc_connect_req
LL_ERR_CON_LIMIT_EXCEED.condition: Maximum number of connections reached on controller

LL_ERR_TERMINATED_MIC_FAILURE.name: gapc_disconnect_req
LL_ERR_TERMINATED_MIC_FAILURE.condition: Connection terminated due to MIC verification failure

LL_ERR_CONN_FAILED_TO_BE_EST.name: gapc_connect_req
LL_ERR_CONN_FAILED_TO_BE_EST.condition: Connection failed to establish (interference or peer rejection)

LL_ERR_INSUFFICIENT_SECURITY.condition: Reading characteristic requires higher security level
